qa_pair.question: What is the name of the bus line with number 1 in Santander?
Find the address of the bus stop with identifier "ayto:15".
How many bus stops are returned by default when calling santander_get_bus_stops without a limit?
What is the line number for the 'CIRCULAR 1' line?
Provide the coordinate latitude for the bus stop at 'Intercambiador del Sardinero' (ID ayto:408).
Which tool would you use to get real-time arrival estimations for a specific stop?
What is the prefix used for all bus tools in this server?
Does the bus line number 2 connect to 'CORBÁN'?
What is the identifier format for a bus line used in santander_get_bus_line_stops?
What are the possible filters for the santander_get_bus_estimations tool?
